de.uka.ilkd.key.java.declaration

Class TypeDeclaration

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.java.JavaSourceElement
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.java.JavaProgramElement
        • de.uka.ilkd.key.java.JavaNonTerminalProgramElement
          • de.uka.ilkd.key.java.declaration.JavaDeclaration
            • de.uka.ilkd.key.java.declaration.TypeDeclaration
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    ClassType, ClassTypeContainer, Member, ProgramModelElement, Type, Declaration, MemberDeclaration, TypeDeclarationContainer, ModelElement, NamedModelElement, NamedProgramElement, NonTerminalProgramElement, ProgramElement, ScopeDefiningElement, SourceElement, TypeScope, VariableScope, SVSubstitute
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    ArrayDeclaration, ClassDeclaration, InterfaceDeclaration, SuperArrayDeclaration

    public abstract class TypeDeclaration
extends JavaDeclaration
implements NamedProgramElement, MemberDeclaration, TypeDeclarationContainer, ClassType, VariableScope, TypeScope
    Type declaration. taken from COMPOST and changed to achieve an immutable structure

      • TypeDeclaration

        public TypeDeclaration()

      • TypeDeclaration

        public TypeDeclaration(Modifier[] mods,
                       ProgramElementName name,
                       ProgramElementName fullName,
                       MemberDeclaration[] members,
                       boolean parentIsInterfaceDeclaration,
                       boolean isLibrary)
        Type declaration.
        Parameters:
        mods - a modifier array.
        name - ProgramElementName of the type
        members - an array containing the memberdeclarations of this type

      • TypeDeclaration

        public TypeDeclaration(ExtList children,
                       ProgramElementName name,
                       ProgramElementName fullName,
                       boolean isLibrary)
        Parameters:
        children - an ExtList of children.
        name - the ProgramElementName of the type May contain: several MemberDeclaration (as members of the type), a parentIsInterfaceDeclaration (indicating if parent is interface), several Modifier (as modifiers of the type decl), Comments

      • TypeDeclaration

        public TypeDeclaration(ExtList children,
                       ProgramElementName fullName,
                       boolean isLibrary)
        Parameters:
        children - an ExtList of children. May contain: a ProgramElementName (as name), several MemberDeclaration (as members of the type), a parentIsInterfaceDeclaration (indicating if parent is interface), several Modifier (as modifiers of the type decl), Comments

    • Method Detail

      • getFirstElement

        public SourceElement getFirstElement()
        Description copied from class: JavaSourceElement
        Finds the source element that occurs first in the source. The default implementation returns this element, which is correct for all terminal program elements, and many non terminals such as statements and prefixed operators.
        Specified by:
        getFirstElement in interface SourceElement
        Overrides:
        getFirstElement in class JavaSourceElement
        Returns:
        the first source element in the syntactical representation of this element, may be equals to this element.
        See Also:
        JavaSourceElement.toSource(), JavaSourceElement.getStartPosition()

      • getLastElement

        public SourceElement getLastElement()
        Description copied from class: JavaSourceElement
        Finds the source element that occurs last in the source. The default implementation returns this element, which is correct for all terminal program elements, and many non terminals such as statements and prefixed operators.
        Specified by:
        getLastElement in interface SourceElement
        Overrides:
        getLastElement in class JavaSourceElement
        Returns:
        the last source element in the syntactical representation of this element, may be equals to this element.
        See Also:
        JavaSourceElement.toSource(), JavaSourceElement.getEndPosition()
